epigraph.quote: The farmer came to visit, bringing an enormous old wasps' nest in a 'black sack' that he'd just removed from his roof.

moments.quote: There were pigeons nesting next to the loos in the Castle. They were setting up a stage for Othello.
We drank Magda's present - Zubrovka made out of bison grass. Delicious. Deceptively easy to drink!
We went to Stokesay Castle + each listened to a tape recording of its history as we wandered around.

moments.place: Elan Valley Reservoirs, Powys, Wales, UK
moments.quote: At any time they had 5,000 men working on them, 12,000 men were on the books.

images.caption: View from table & chairs behind hedge at camp site Eastward, Shropshire

moments.quote: We are next to running water & there are cows on the flat valley bottom.
We found a church service, Matins in Welsh, warm welcome, at Tregaron.
